package service

import "context"

type CreateUserSpec struct {
    Name string
}

type CreateUserResult struct {
    ID int
}

type UserRepository interface {
    Create(ctx context.Context, input CreateUserSpec) (CreateUserResult, error)
}

type UserService struct {
    repo UserRepository
}

func NewUserService(repo UserRepository) *UserService {
    return &UserService{repo: repo}
}

func (s *UserService) Create(ctx context.Context, input CreateUserSpec) (CreateUserResult, error) {
    return s.repo.Create(ctx, input)
}
